Instructions: This is a template. Customize all bracketed items, quotes, and details before distribution. Remove this instruction block and the Forhemit header/footer when publishing. Forhemit's name should not appear in the public release unless specifically agreed upon.
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE — {{closingDate}}
{{companyName}} Transitions to Employee Ownership Through ESOP
{{tagline}}

{{city}}, {{state}} — {{closingDate}} — {{companyName}}, a {{industry}} company based in {{city}}, {{state}}, today announced that it has become an employee-owned company through the establishment of an Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP). The transaction, which transfers 100% ownership of the company to the ESOP trust, was completed on {{closingDate}}.

Under the ESOP, all eligible employees will receive beneficial ownership interests in the company at no cost to them. The ESOP is funded entirely by the company and serves as a qualified retirement plan under federal law.

"{{ownerQuote}}"

— {{senderName}}, {{senderTitle}}, {{companyName}}

{{companyName}} employs {{employeeCount}} people and has been in operation since {{foundingYear}}. The company specializes in {{specialization}} and serves {{customerBase}}.

The transition to employee ownership was facilitated by a team of professionals including an independent ESOP trustee, ERISA counsel, and transaction stewardship firm. The transaction was structured to preserve the company's independence, retain its workforce, and align employee interests with long-term company performance.

"{{employeeQuote}}"

— {{employeeName}}, {{employeeTitle}}, {{companyName}}

Research shows that employee-owned companies tend to have higher productivity, lower turnover, and greater resilience during economic downturns. ESOP participants accumulate retirement wealth tied to the company's performance, creating a direct link between individual effort and financial outcome.

{{companyName}} will continue to operate under its current name and management structure. The ESOP does not change the company's day-to-day operations, customer relationships, or employment practices.

About {{companyName}}

{{companyName}} is a {{industry}} company based in {{city}}, {{state}}. Founded in {{foundingYear}}, the company {{companyDescription}}. For more information, visit {{companyWebsite}}.
